content: Resend@6.14.0 + @react-email/components@1.0.12 is the standard 2025/2026 Next.js transactional email stack. New client API: import { Resend } from 'resend'; const resend = new Resend(process.env.RESEND_API_KEY). Send via resend.emails.send() from Server Actions or API routes. React Email 6 (react-email@6.6.4) ships with dark mode, Tailwind 4 support, spam score, and full component library. @react-email/components bundles Body, Button, Container, Head, Heading, Hr, Html, Img, Link, Preview, Row, Section, Text primitives. Production requirement: verify domain in Resend dashboard; development uses onboarding@resend.dev without domain verification.
